title: corysanthes picta
side_effects: Corysanthes picta can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing allergic reactions, diarrhea, and stomach cramps. Some individuals may experience an increased heart rate or blood pressure when consuming large amounts of the plant. In rare cases, overuse of Corysanthes picta can lead to liver or kidney damage, and in severe instances, it may cause seizures or coma. It is crucial to consult a medical professional or a qualified herbalist before using the plant for medicinal purposes.
